case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. ROCHA BAYARDO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BAYARDO, ROCHA AKA BAYARDO ROCHA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAYARDO, ROCHA AKA BAYARDO ROCHA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 UNION STREET #429, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94133, SAN FRANCISCO, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $74.96 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED OCT-11-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-13-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT BAYARDO, ROCHA AKA BAYARDO ROCHA
POS OF MANDATORY COVERSHEET AND SUPPLEMENTAL ALLEGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BAYARDO, ROCHA AKA BAYARDO ROCHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BAYARDO, ROCHA AKA BAYARDO ROCHA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
